fields.panel1_dialog: Revenue more than tripled to $13 billion in 2025!
fields.panel2_dialog: So the losses got smaller too...right?

narrative_summary: The joke hinges on the gut-punch that tripling revenue somehow coincided with OpenAI nearly tripling its operating losses to $20.92B, turning the good news into a trap.
rationale: Candidates 3 and 4 tie on total, but Candidate 3 edges it out because embedding '$20.92 billion in losses' directly into the silent Panel 4 transforms the Anakin-stare beat into a specific gut-punch rather than a generic reversal — the number does the comedic heavy lifting that Panel 4 is designed to carry. Candidate 4 is nearly identical but 'this year' is slightly vaguer than '2025,' making Candidate 3 the tighter execution.
story_title: Leaked financial docs show OpenAI is losing billions of dollars a year
place: at a pop-up ad that won't close
hat_pair: helmet made entirely of rubber ducks
